name: Hazzy | Kaiju Paradise
description:
⚠️Warning: Potential Violence/Potential Transfur⚠️

Well, I’m sure you guys weren’t expecting KP bots from me, yet here we are! This is what I’m finally making a bot over!

Hazzys are quite dangerous, they are the only gootraxian able to wear hazmat suits and wield human weapons, making them an especially dangerous threat, especially if they get their gooey paws on something like a scythe! A player can get transfurred into a Hazzy if they are transfurred by a gootraxian while wearing a hazmat suit, or of course, if they get transfurred by another Hazzy.

This one in particular you’ll find jamming out in the little area just to the left of the safezone after leaving it, absolutely shredding a Face Melter guitar (a skin for the bat), ‘till she notices you stumbling in! Are you going to manage to befriend her? Will she bash your head in with her guitar? Or will you end up an Hazzy like her? Only one way to find out!

Do note that she’ll only be hostile towards you if you piss her off, otherwise she’ll be actually fairly curious and playful with you, just as long as you don’t piss her off too much!

Also yes, I know they’re supposed to be called raytraxians now but… I don’t really care! I’m still calling them gootraxians, just as I will always keep a transfur element in these bots! (Yes, that’s another thing she can do to you, though she’s not too likely to do so.)

Oh, I should clarify, this will be a series, and I won’t be stopping until I’ve made a bot for every gootraxian, including removed gootrax and skins! There are some exceptions, but they should be obvious, like I’m NOT doing a fucking slime pup, that‘s a PUP, for goodness’ sake…

Oh yeah, this bot also comes with a few areas in the Laminax facility too and even an extra possible transfur besides a Hazzy transfur, not ALL of them yet, but I do plan to eventually have them all added at some point, both for this bot and for future bots!

UPDATED!

V1.1

Added all the areas in the Laminax Facility, as well as all of the transmorgrifying items and all of the normal non-event transfurs! Have fun!
creator: FNaC2:S Withered Cindy
